overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit urban district at night. The player moves from an open plaza dominated by a large Tyger Claws gang sign, through a commercial street with vending machines, and into a covered market area with colorful neon ceiling lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large Tyger Claws neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the large red Tyger Claws neon sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the Tyger Claws sign

entered.detail: large red neon sign with Japanese characters and Tyger Claws text dominating the plaza
rectangular concrete planter with glowing neon edges and warning signage
tall building with large digital advertisements displaying animated content
tree with pink blossoms illuminated by red neon light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, dominated by a massive red Tyger Claws neon sign ahead. The camera walks forward past concrete planters with glowing edges, while digital billboards line the buildings on both sides. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance toward the sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vending machines and billboards

events.description: camera turns right to follow the street along the building facade, moving away from the Tyger Claws sign

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the building facade, passing rows of vending machines

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with Watson Whore text and imagery on building facade
row of automated vending machines with glowing displays and Japanese text
entrance to covered market area with glowing pink and blue ceiling lights visible inside
digital billboard displaying The Legend advertisement with purple neon

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right along the building facade, revealing the Watson Whore billboard and moving past rows of vending machines on the left. The Tyger Claws sign falls behind as the camera approaches the entrance to a covered market area with colorful neon ceiling lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market interior with changing neon ceiling lights

events.description: entering covered market area with pink neon ceiling lights and market stalls
ceiling lights shift from pink to blue and green as camera moves deeper into market

agents.ego_description: entering the covered market and walking through the interior passage with debris and stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking ahead through the market interior

entered.detail: colorful neon ceiling panels shifting between pink, blue, and green illumination
abandoned market stalls with crates, debris, and scattered merchandise
scattered trash bags, cardboard, and discarded items along the walkway
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters glowing white and purple

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered market, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered interior with a vibrant neon ceiling that shifts colors from pink to blue to green. The walkway is lined with abandoned market stalls, debris piles, and scattered trash. A pedestrian in a pink jacket walks ahead as the camera moves deeper into the market passage, passing Japanese signage on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza into the sheltered, cluttered depths of a covered market. It begins by walking forward through an open square dominated by a massive red Tyger Claws sign and glowing concrete planters, with digital billboards lining the surrounding buildings. As the camera turns right along a building facade, it passes the Watson Whore billboard and rows of vending machines, leaving the open plaza behind to approach a sheltered entrance. The scene then shifts from the open street into a covered market, where the lighting transforms into a vibrant neon ceiling that cycles through pink, blue, and green hues. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the passage, passing abandoned stalls, scattered debris, and Japanese signage while following a pedestrian in a pink jacket.
